title: gratiola stricta
intro: Gratiola stricta, also known as bitter root or American bitters, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and act as an expectorant to ease respiratory issues. The health benefits associated with Gratiola stricta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Gratiola stricta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
